title: Ritsuko conversation in ep 23
wikitext:
[]: Ritsuko conversation in ep 23             Quote Post by r0ach » Mon Jan 30, 2012 8:09 pm I have question about a part of the diolouge in this ep. She made a comment about how "the only vessel that could hold a soul was Rei". This is clearly not true, considering Kaworou and the Evas can hold a soul. So I'm curious as to what exactly she was referring to. Help?

[]: Re: Ritsuko conversation in ep 23             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Jan 30, 2012 8:50 pm r0ach wrote: She made a comment about how "the only vessel that could hold a soul was Rei".

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Jan 31, 2012 1:17 pm She's basically saying there can only be one Rei at a time, imo.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Jan 31, 2012 3:38 pm Yeah. Remember Shinji has just delivered one of his patent "Ayanami...Rei..." lines. She's correcting him: these things aren't Rei, just dummies; Rei is just the name given to the one who has the soul.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Feb 01, 2012 12:35 pm By "vessel" she means not any potential vessels in general, but the clones.
